01 · Vision
MyResorts

Building places where exceptional experiences meet attractive returns.

MyResorts is a Czech-led developer and operator of boutique hospitality projects on Bali. We design, build, and run resorts that work as homes for their owners and as businesses for their guests — with a single team accountable for both.

Resorts

Villas & apartments
15M
USD portfolio value
02 · Project
02Desa Kutuh · Nusa Dua · Bali

A collection of villas for individual ownership with year-round rental.

In Desa Kutuh, on the southern edge of Nusa Dua, eight luxury villas are taking shape — currently under construction, with handover to owners scheduled for 2027. Seven are already placed with private owners, one remains.

03 · Destination
03A globally beloved destination

Pristine nature, rich culture, world-class infrastructure.

Bali — currently one of the most popular vacation destinations in the world — combines the best of nature and civilization. Its year-round season makes it one of the most profitable holiday locations anywhere.

04 · Model
04The MyResorts model

Investment, experience, and full service in one.

— Maximum yield

A year-round season, fully utilized

We know how to maximize occupancy throughout the year. We choose locations that work year-round and design projects to remain attractive well outside peak tourist season.

— Zero worries

We handle it all

From guest communication and cleaning to maintenance, accounting, and legal services. Even if you decide to use the property purely for your own stays, your time off remains exactly that — time off.

05 · Service
05Professional service

For your peace of mind and comfort.

For each resort we tailor the management and service model, leveraging the synergy of other operations in the location. The scope of services you use is entirely up to you.

06 · Surroundings
06The location

30 minutes from the international airport.

Next to the five-star Kempinski hotel, white-sand beaches, a golf course, and renowned beach clubs.

Benoa Harbor is nearby — with day trips to surrounding islands, snorkeling with manta rays, and iconic landmarks such as the Garuda Wisnu Kencana statue, the fifth largest in the world.

07 · Design
07Studio Identity Designers

Biophilic design — connection to nature, daylight, local materials.

Villas designed by renowned Studio Identity Designers↗. Architecture that respects place and climate, and finds a natural balance between privacy and openness.

08 · Spaces
08Spaces of the villa

Maximum privacy, seamless connection to nature.

— Open living space

At the heart of every villa, an open space.

A generous living room flowing into a fully equipped kitchen. A solid stone island and a large dining table create an ideal setting for family gatherings and entertaining. The space transitions naturally onto the outdoor terrace and pool — a seamless flow between interior and the tropical outdoors.

09 · Features
09Features

Private pool, en-suite bedrooms, ocean-view terrace.

A master bedroom with a freestanding bathtub, a spacious double shower, and a full-height glass wall opening to the tropical landscape.

16 · Q&A
16Frequently asked

What you need to know.

What stage is the project at?+

The villas are currently under construction. Handover to owners is scheduled for 2027. Seven of the eight villas are placed with private owners, one remains.

What is the ownership structure in Bali?+

Villas are offered under Lease Hold with a term of 25 to 30 years — the standard structure for foreign investors in Indonesia. The lease term can typically be extended through a renewal agreement with the landowner.

When are the payments made?+

35% on signing, 35% on shell completion, 25% on construction completion, and 5% on handover.

Who manages the rentals and the guests?+

Everything is handled by MyResorts — from guest communication, cleaning, and maintenance to accounting and marketing. Management runs at 20% of income, marketing at 10%.

What is the expected return?+

For the 3BR villa we model an ROI between 13.9% and 16.9% per year, depending on occupancy (70–80%). Payback is between 5.9 and 7.2 years.

Can I use the villa for personal stays?+

Yes. The villas are sold for individual ownership — you decide when you stay and when you offer it for rent. MyResorts provides full service even during your own stays.

Where exactly are the villas located?+

In Desa Kutuh, the southern edge of the Nusa Dua resort area on the south of Bali — 30 minutes from the international airport, next to the Kempinski hotel, white-sand beaches, a golf course, and renowned beach clubs.

One villa remains.

Seven of the eight Ananta Villas are placed with private owners. The last one is open to a conversation.
